name: role
label: Role / area of responsibility
help_text: Small caps label above the name.

name: title
label: Title
help_text: One-line title shown below the name.

name: email
label: Email
help_text: Used for the mailto: link and shown on the card.

name: blurb
label: What this person handles (optional)
default: Approves brand-page edits, voice and tone, public communications.

name: show_send_mail_button
label: Show 'Send mail' button
help_text: Adds a button below the email.
